title: santaloides harmandiana
intro: Santaloides harmandiana, also known as Vietnamese sandalwood, is a species of plant in the family Santalaceae, native to Indochina. It is prized for its aromatic wood and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Santaloides harmandiana include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and soothing skin irritations. Santaloides harmandiana is often prepared as an essential oil, incense, or infused in water for its herbal preparations, and can be used in aromatherapy, perfumery, and traditional medicine.
